title: RainX: Reign of Nether Extras
description: A Performance and QoL focused modpack for the Reign of Nether Mod.
body:
![Hero View of The Spires w/ Epoch Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pwKmpg9J/images/b14873496475473ad5fc2d148b02f72959c5182e_350.webp)

## TL;DR
RainX is a QoL and Performance focused modpack for the Reign of Nether mod, bringing some new features and retro vibes to Minecraft RTS matches. It comes preloaded with a custom map made just for RainX which supports 1v1, 2v2, and 3v3 formats, aswell as the tutorial world for Reign of Nether so that onboarding becomes as easy as possible. 
RainX also features Essentials for playing Reign of Nether with friends, Building Wands to assist with map creation, Oculus Shaders alongside the Epoch shader for a nice nostalgic RTS feel, Huge Structure Blocks for what will hopefully be a future of randomly generated RoN maps via structure/puzzle blocks, and finally Cascades (Hybrid Beta) for some old school minecraft worldgen to experience random gen RoN in ways never before seen. 

![RTS View of The Spire, w/ Epoch Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pwKmpg9J/images/099510680789ec23d63c7dd0641fb0976436ce09_350.webp)

## How to start playing:
The best place to start getting into matches with other players is the official Discord for [Reign of Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts) aswell as the RainX Discord which is more specifically for the RainX Modpack. A tutorial world comes pre-loaded to help onboard even people who have never played an RTS game before and matchmaking is featured in many community servers.
